title: — Options
text:
--config string
Path to a kubeadm configuration file.
--dry-run
Don't apply any changes; just output what would be done.
-h, --help
help for mark-control-plane
--node-name string
Specify the node name.
Path to a kubeadm configuration file.

help for mark-control-plane
Specify the node name.
